scripts.dev: node ./scripts/prepare.mjs && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_KIOSK_FOLDER_MODE=true NEXT_PUBLIC_MAIC_EDITOR_ENABLED=false NEXT_PUBLIC_KIOSK_LOCAL_FIXTURE=true next dev -p 8080
scripts.build:local: node ./scripts/prepare.mjs && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_KIOSK_FOLDER_MODE=true NEXT_PUBLIC_MAIC_EDITOR_ENABLED=false NEXT_PUBLIC_KIOSK_LOCAL_FIXTURE=true next build
scripts.build: node ./scripts/prepare.mjs && cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_KIOSK_FOLDER_MODE=true NEXT_PUBLIC_MAIC_EDITOR_ENABLED=false next build
